title: Date & Time Box
description: Date & Time Box component enables users to input both date and time, displaying the selected values in various formats. It offers customization options like readonly and disabled states and supports multiple calendar types, including gregorian and solar-hijri. The component supports content projection slots for prefix, suffix, and clear button elements.

sections.title: Time Only
sections.description: You can configure ax-datetime-box to accept only time input.

sections.title: Date Only
sections.description: You can configure ax-datetime-box to accept only date input.

sections.title: Min-Max Validation
sections.description: Set minimum and maximum date/time values to restrict user selection.

sections.title: States
sections.description: Demonstrates different states of the component including disabled, readonly, and error states.

sections.title: Look Styles
sections.description: Showcases different visual appearance styles using the look property.

sections.title: Calendar Types
sections.description: Shows different calendar systems including Gregorian and Solar Hijri calendars.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Sets the component to readonly mode. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input field. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Minimum selectable date/time value. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Maximum selectable date/time value. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Visual state of the component (e.g., error, success). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for the input element. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: depth
props.description: Depth of the calendar view. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: ID attribute for the input element. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: type
props.description: Type of the calendar system (e.g., gregorian, solar-hijri). Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent. Deprecated: use 'calendar' input instead.

props.name: look
props.description: Visual style of the component (solid, fill, outline, flat, none). Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: holidayDates
props.description: Holiday dates to highlight in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: disabledDates
props.description: Dates to disable in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: activeView
props.description: Active view of the calendar (day, month, year). Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: interface
props.description: Interface type for the calendar component. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: showNavigation
props.description: Whether to show navigation controls. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: count
props.description: Number of calendar views to display. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: picker
props.description: Picker mode: 'date', 'time', or 'datetime'.

props.name: calendar
props.description: Calendar type to use for the input.

props.name: format
props.description: Format string for displaying the value. Deprecated: use locale and mode instead.

props.name: allowTyping
props.description: Allow manual typing in the input field.

props.name: weekend
props.description: Array of weekend day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). Used to determine which days are considered weekends for styling and behavior.

props.name: weekdays
props.description: Array of working day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). If not provided, uses the calendar system's default weekdays.

props.name: oldText
props.description: Previous text value for change detection. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component value has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: initValue
props.description: Initial value of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default value of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: cellTemplate
props.description: Template for calendar cells. Deprecated: use dayCellTemplate, monthCellTemplate, yearCellTemplate instead. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: dayCellTemplate
props.description: Template for day cells in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: monthCellTemplate
props.description: Template for month cells in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: yearCellTemplate
props.description: Template for year cells in the calendar. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: cellClass
props.description: CSS class for calendar cells. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: Indicates whether the dropdown is currently open. Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.

events.name: onNavigate

events.name: activeViewChange

events.name: disabledDatesChange

events.description: Emitted when the holiday dates change. Inherited from MXCalendarBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged

events.description: Emitted when a key is pressed down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles the dropdown if the component is not disabled.
 *
 * Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Switches between open and closed states.
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Opens the dropdown if it is not already open and the component is not disabled, then focuses the dropdown.
 *
 * Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Dropdown becomes open and receives focus.
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Closes the dropdown if it is open and the component is not disabled, then focuses the host.
 *
 * Inherited from MXDropdownBoxBaseComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Dropdown is closed and focus returns to the host.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Component loses focus.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnChange(fn: (value: Date) => void): void

/**
 * Writes a value to the component (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param value - The value to write.
 */
writeValue(value: Date): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: Date, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors.
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Validation errors are cleared.
 */
resetErrors(): void

/**
 * Marks the component as dirty (modified).
 *
 * Inherited from MXValueComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Component is marked as dirty.
 */
markAsDirty(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Focuses the component. Overrides the base focus method to focus the input element.
 *
 * Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.
 *
 * @returns void - Component receives focus.
 */
focus(): void
